hotels.name: Aparthotel Amella

Comfortable Accommodations: Aparthotel Amella in RГ„В«ga offers spacious family rooms with kitchenettes, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes air-conditioning, a washing machine, and free WiFi.

Prime City Centre Location: Carillon Aparthotel - Keystone Collection in RГ„В«ga offers a central position with Riga Dome Cathedral just a 2-minute walk away. Nearby attractions include Bastejkalna Parks (700 metres) and the Latvian National Museum of Art (13-minute walk).
